disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No upper-tract/systemic features — no fever/chills/rigors, no loin/flank (costovertebral) pain, no nausea/vomiting, not systemically unwell (screens pyelonephritis)
trigger_question_examples: Any fever, shakes/rigors, or pain in your back/side (loin), or feeling generally unwell / vomiting?
Is the pain just low down/on weeing, or also in your back/side?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fever or shakes, no back/side pain, no vomiting — it's the burning and constant urge low down.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Not pregnant / pregnancy status to confirm, and non-complicated (no vaginal discharge/irritation suggesting STI/vaginitis, not male/child/catheter/recurrent/immunocompromised) — uncomplicated cystitis in a non-pregnant woman
trigger_question_examples: Any vaginal discharge, itch or new sexual partner (which can point to a different infection), or a catheter/kidney problems?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I don't think I'm pregnant, no vaginal discharge or itch, no catheter or kidney problems.
